data.title: Carnival Cuts Annual Profit Outlook, Stock Falls
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE: CCL) (NYSE: CUK) surpassed analyst expectations with its financial results. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 20 cents, beating the estimated 18 cents. Revenue also saw growth, increasing by 6.1% to $6.165 billion, exceeding the anticipated $6.134 billion. The diluted GAAP EPS was reported at 19 cents. Carnival's net income attributable to the company was $258 million, a significant improvement from the $78 million loss recorded in the previous year. Adjusted net income reached $275 million, while adjusted EBITDA hit a new first-quarter record of $1.267 billion. Despite facing a $54 million, or 4 cents per share, adverse impact from fuel prices, the company stated that its results outperformed expectations. The stock, however, experienced a decline following the announcement of these positive financial outcomes. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Pondurance Launches Pondurance Kanati(™): the Industry's First Agentic AI SOC Designed for Autonomous Operations in a Next-Generation Managed Detection and Response Service
data.description: In a recent press release dated March 20, 2026, it was announced that Pondurance has introduced Pondurance Kanati as the industry's inaugural Agentic AI SOC. This new development signifies a significant shift in SOC operations within the next-generation MDR, combining over 60TB of daily event, alert, and threat intelligence data with contextual AI. The primary goal of this advancement is to bolster containment measures against high-confidence threats.

data.title: OrboGraph Wins 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award in Fraud Detection and Prevention
data.description: OrboGraph, based in Burlington, Massachusetts, has recently been honored with a win in the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards for Fraud Detection and Prevention. The award, presented by the Business Intelligence Group, celebrates the achievements of organizations, products, teams, and individuals utilizing artificial intelligence to make tangible impacts. The 2026 edition of the awards highlights advancements in various industries and recognizes those driving significant change with AI.

data.title: Governor Braun to Keynote IBJ Media's Nine-City Innovate Indiana Event Series
data.description: IBJ Media revealed that Indiana Governor Mike Braun is set to deliver a keynote address at the upcoming Innovate Indiana event series held in nine cities. Beginning on May 15 in Fort Wayne, Indiana, these gatherings aim to convene leaders for discussions on regional economies and prospects for growth. The first event is scheduled to take place in Fort Wayne, Indiana. This initiative was announced on March 27, 2026, in Indianapolis.
